use_cases: Trigger primary actions in forms and applications
Create call-to-action buttons for user engagement
Implement destructive action confirmations with variant styling
Build navigation controls and menu triggers
Add accessible interactive controls with keyboard focus support
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Features multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with built-in hover, focus, and disabled states. Styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, flat aesthetic that integrates seamlessly into any design system.
